interrupted_apply_placeholders.next_safe_action: If APPLY is interrupted, require human review before resume, reassignment, lock release, staging, commit, or push.

review_rules: APPLY work without completed validation is REVIEW_REQUIRED.
Changed files must match the approved packet path list.
Locks tied to interrupted APPLY must not be released automatically.
Packets tied to interrupted APPLY must not be reassigned automatically.
next_safe_action: Keep APPLY recovery blocked until a human operator reviews packet, worker, lock, and validation state.
